economic_notes: GBEs include NDC LP (forestry, consulting, ventures), Myguard Security Group LP (mine security), Onikaajigan Construction LP (in dissolution), Anokiigamig Construction LP (construction), Agency One LP. Naicatchewenin Development Corporation is a fully consolidated subsidiary. Construction in progress includes new water treatment plant and water/wastewater infrastructure upgrades.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to NDC LP equity investments recorded at cost rather than fair value per IFRS requirements, making it impossible to determine fair value adjustments. Fiscal year is 2022 not 2024 as per the document. Province is Ontario based on Fort Frances audit office and Ontario ministry references. Total government transfers calculated as federal ($7,987,895) + provincial ($1,285,067) = $9,272,962. OSR = $15,583,121 - $9,272,962 = $6,310,159. Restricted cash estimated from CMHC replacement reserve ($247,095) plus funding agreements ($9,790,190) held within cash = $10,037,285 plus internal reserves. Net financial assets per balance sheet = $34,200,104 (this is net assets/equity, not net financial assets line; actual net financial assets line = financial assets $48,433,755 - liabilities $14,233,651 = $34,200,104). Annual debt service is principal repayments only ($120,699). No schedule of remuneration found in provided text.
